seoTitle: Bletchley vs Blewitt Springs — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bletchley and Blewitt Springs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bletchley vs Blewitt Springs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bletchley and Blewitt Springs.
heading: Bletchley vs Blewitt Springs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bletchley, South Australia and Blewitt Springs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blewitt Springs has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Bletchley (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bletchley or Blewitt Springs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bletchley has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Blewitt Springs scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bletchley scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Blewitt Springs scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bletchley or Blewitt Springs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blewitt Springs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
